sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100440" key="suneuasth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνευαστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n100440.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fellow-bacchanal</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orph.</author> </bibl> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Εὐχή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
